zh.Plumpton, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾
zh.Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert De Plumptom於1187年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親Nigel I De Plumpton19歲，母親Juliana de Warwick17歲。他於大約1213年與Miss MOWBRAY在英國英格蘭越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1244年在英國英格蘭越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert De Plumptom于1187年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲Nigel I De Plumpton19岁，母亲Juliana de Warwick17岁。他于大约1213年与Miss MOWBRAY在英国英格兰越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1244年在英国英格兰越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Plumptom
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English plūme, plȳme ‘plum, plum tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, including Plumpton (Yorkshire, Northamptonshire, Sussex, Cumbria), Fieldplumpton or Woodplumpton (Lancashire), Plympton (Devon), and a lost Plumpton in Kingsbury (Warwicks).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert De Plumptom was born in 1187, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nigel I De Plumpton, was 19 and his mother, Juliana de Warwick, was 17. He married Miss MOWBRAY about 1213, in Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1244, in Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

Il a épousé Miss MOWBRAY environ 1213, à Plumpton by Ecclesall, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1244, à Plumpton by Ecclesall, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

ko.Plumpton, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 치레사

ko.lifeSummary: Robert De Plumptom(이)가 1187년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nigel I De Plumpton(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana de Warwick(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1213년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 치레사에서 Miss MOWBRAY(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1244년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 치레사에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert De Plumptom родился в 1187 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nigel I De Plumpton было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliana de Warwick, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Miss MOWBRAY около 1213 г. в местности плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1244 г. в местности плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.
